text: The operator of an off-highway motor vehicle shall be able to reach and operate all controls necessary to safely operate the vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 5. Off-Highway Vehicle Operating Rules [38280 - 38321]
#### Article 2. Operating Controls [38304 - 38304.1]
##### § 38304

The operator of an off-highway motor vehicle shall be able to reach and operate all controls necessary to safely operate the vehicle.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1093.)*

subsections.text: The operator of an off-highway motor vehicle shall be able to reach and operate all controls necessary to safely operate the vehicle.
